allOf.title: community

description.description: The description of the community. The maximum length is 1,024 characters.

displayName.description: The name of the community. The maximum length is 255 characters.

groupId.description: The ID of the Microsoft 365 group that manages the membership of this community.

group.description: The Microsoft 365 group that manages the membership of this community.

owners.description: The admins of the community. Limited to 100 users. If this property isn't specified when you create the community, the calling user is automatically assigned as the community owner.

allOf.description:
Represents a community in Viva Engage that is a central place for conversations,
files, events, and updates for people sharing a common interest or goal.
